nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the sqlsmith fuzz testing crate, declaring two binaries (sqlsmith and reducer) and an integration test with madsim feature gating.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Overview documentation for the sqlsmith SQL fuzzing tool covering how to add features, run with madsim, perform E2E random fuzzing, differential testing, and generate function signatures.

nodes.name: clippy.toml
nodes.summary: Minimal clippy lint configuration for the sqlsmith crate, overriding specific lint levels.

nodes.name: config.yml
nodes.summary: YAML configuration for sqlsmith query generation, specifying weighting parameters for random SQL statement generation.

nodes.name: develop.md
nodes.summary: Developer guide for sqlsmith with 16 sections covering how to add query clauses, expressions, functions, aggregates, test runner internals, query generation strategies, and workflow details.
